bh.shot_strategy: Flight plate exposed to wind. Avoid natural BH line. Prefer RHFH or a controlled hyzer with an overstable disc to keep it low and straight.

bh.shot_strategy: Natural fade works with wind. Manageable with a clean BH, aim slightly left of the basket to account for fade. Consider anhyzer if needed.
